历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 4619 → 4176 → 4320 → 3498 → 4507, with significant fluctuations in recent 5 years. The university's enrollment plan in Qinghai for Science/Physics Category was 8, 8, 8, 9 from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 7 in 2025; the 2026 plan remains 7, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction effect.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 113th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a slight decline in recent years (104 in 2021 → 113 in 2026), overall level stable; the university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity ranking 50th (relatively hot), short video exposure moderate, application attention average; no A- or above disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, though characteristic disciplines like Transportation Engineering and Navigation Technology have high industry recognition but not A-level, overall discipline competitiveness moderate.
